Posted at 8 AM EST

Cough. Some of y'all may recognize this bot...

Okay, so, let me get y'all up to speed!

J.AI's TOS has had an update and avatars are no longer allowed to have minor characters (regardless of whether the char def or description says the RP age)

Obviously, I only make adult characters and even in AUs they're all like 20+, butttt this new rule means the avatars can't be a minor AT ALL.

For most chars this is fine BUT I'm having a problem with Sukuna since he has only been animated so far being in Yuuji's body. I already talked about this on my announcements doc about issues with this, yes I'm being difficult, I can't help having irrational issues like this 😩

moving on,

Quite a few of my bots I have privated cause I have to change the pfp, and unfortunately some I have accidentally deleted because I was rushing (I was personally reached out to by a mod which is why it got done pretty fast)

This bot was among one of the accidentally deleted bots 😭

So, if y'all are confused as to why some bots seem to have "disappeared" it's because I've either privated or accidentally deleted them...

And I'm very lazy so god bless y'all 🙏

Welcome to self worth discovery with Satoru Gojo 😭

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
